title: Create an account (lastname/firstname/type/currency) and read it back
prompt: Create a new account. Accounts have NO `name` field — they use `lastname` and `firstname`. Set lastname to "{recordPrefix}-{runId}", firstname to "Acct", and type to CUSTOMER (type enum: PROSPECT=0, CUSTOMER=1, SUPPLIER=2). Accounts also require a `currency` code (the column is NOT NULL with no default) — use "EUR". Output the new account's numeric ID on the RESULT line, e.g. `RESULT: 5678`.
